list.title: Tabular reviews.
list.subtitle: Define your columns (duration, amount, jurisdiction, clauses…), select a batch of documents, get a structured table.
list.useCaseBody: 30 supplier contracts, columns for duration / amount / jurisdiction / termination clause / GDPR clause, batch extraction, comparable table. The values can then be reused in the chat.
list.emptyBody: You'll define the columns, choose your documents, and start the extraction. The AI fills the table row by row.

new.title: New review
new.noProviderBody: You must configure and enable at least one AI provider to create a review.
new.subtitle: Define the columns to extract from your documents, choose the AI model, and select the files to analyze.

form.errorColumnRequired: At least one column is required.
form.errorColumnFields: Every column must have a label and an instruction.
form.columnsHint: Each column becomes a value extracted per document. The instruction is used as the Zod description for the model.
form.columnPromptPlaceholder: Extraction instruction (e.g. Total duration in years, numeric format)
form.documentsHint: Select the files to analyze. You can add or remove more later.
form.noDocuments: No document with extracted text for now.
form.selectedDocs: {count, plural, one {# document selected} other {# documents selected}}

addDocuments.toastSuccess: {count, plural, one {# document added} other {# documents added}}.
addDocuments.triggerTitleAllAdded: All your indexed documents are already in the review
addDocuments.dialogDescription: Added documents will appear as “pending”; then start the extraction.

actions.rerunDescription: Pending or failed rows will be resubmitted to the model. Rows already extracted successfully are not affected.
actions.deleteDescription: The table and all extracted values will be permanently deleted. The original documents remain in your library.

grid.emptyNoRows: No document has been added to this review. Recreate a review by selecting documents.
grid.caption: Extraction results
grid.removeTitle: Remove this document from the review?
grid.removeDescription: “{filename}” will be removed from the review table. The document itself stays in your library.

columnEdit.heading: Edit column
columnEdit.promptHint: Describe what Louis should extract. Editing the prompt does not recompute already extracted values — use “Re-extract” to rerun this column on all documents.
columnEdit.rerunButtonTitle: Saves and reruns extraction of this column on all documents
columnEdit.deleteConfirmDescription: “{label}” will be removed from the review. The values extracted for this column across all rows will be permanently lost.
